channel_order_policy: PIL RGB input is used; torchvision ToPILImage handles tensor channel order C,H,W to PIL image.
dtype_conversion_policy: mixed_precision selects fp16/fp32 weight_dtype; postprocess converts CPU tensor through torchvision ToPILImage.
crop_resize_policy: input image is resized/upscaled and cropped to multiples of 8 before model; resize_flag branch exists after inference.
color_fix_policy: optional adain_color_fix or wavelet_color_fix after ToPILImage.
